archetype: 7 (Electric & Neon - Customized for Premium Cosmic Tech Agency)
emotional_tone: Cutting-edge, Visionary, Premium, Cosmic yet Professional

typography.guidelines: Do not use generic sans for headings. Apply tracking-tighter to all H1 and H2. Use Outfit for all headings to provide a futuristic, rounded, geometric feel. Body text (IBM Plex Sans) must be highly legible and sterile for contrast.

colors.guidelines: Background must be deep cosmic void, not pure black. Use glassmorphism extensively but cleanly (Crystal glass variant). Avoid default gradients; use glowing accents, blurs behind borders, or 'tracing beam' effects to represent futuristic UX.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy - 2-3x typical spacing. Mobile-first responsive.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Services and Portfolio sections. Create asymmetry. Span logic: mix col-span-4, col-span-8 to create visual tension. Never fill 100% perfectly, leave negative space.
layout_and_spacing.corner_radius: Extremely rounded to match futuristic UI constraints. Use rounded-3xl or rounded-full for cards and buttons. Avoid sharp edges.
layout_and_spacing.section_spacing: py-24 to py-32 for standard sections.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-white text-[#050211] font-medium px-8 py-4 hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white backdrop-blur-md px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300

cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#050211]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

inputs.text: bg-[#050211]/50 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 text-white placeholder-[#68647D] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D111A2] focus:border-transparent transition-all

visual_effects.glow: Use drop-shadows with primary/secondary colors to create cosmic neon glow (e.g. drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(209,17,162,0.5)]).
visual_effects.tracing_beam: Apply moving gradient borders or subtle glowing edges to active or hovered glass cards.
visual_effects.glassmorphism: Mandatory 1px delicate inner stroke on all glass surfaces. Heavy blur (backdrop-blur-xl or 2xl).

logo.alt: Quasar Apps Logo - Glowing Cosmic Dog
logo.usage: Main navigation, footer, and potentially floating as a 3D element in the hero background.

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract light painting with vibrant blue and purple swirls, heavily blurred as hero backdrop.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT USE INTER FONT FOR HEADINGS. Load 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts.
Implement the 'Crystal Glass' variant for all cards: bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-2xl, border-white/10.

For the hero section, overlay the hero_backgrounds[0] image with a deep radial gradient (e.g., bg-gradient-to-b from-[#050211]/40 via-[#050211]/80 to-[#050211]) so the text pops and the cosmic colors bleed through organically.
Implement a Custom Marquee for the Clients section using react-fast-marquee. Apply a mix-blend-mode or grayscale filter so they match the futuristic dark aesthetic.
Use Framer Motion for scroll reveals, staggered bento grid animations, and hover states.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
Do NOT use generic Shadcn cards without modifying them heavily to fit the glassmorphism aesthetic. Raw HTML/Tailwind is preferred for the layout.
Never center everything. Use optical alignment and left-aligned dense layouts for the bento grids.
Include a functional contact form that stores data, styled as a glowing futuristic glass panel.
